'''Trilos''' was a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Atraken/Legends|Atraken]], the only one with a breathable [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]]. An Atrakenite [[Mining/Legends|mining]] colony was established on Trilos several [[Standard year/Legends|years]] prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. After the [[Battle of Atraken]], [[Refugee Relief Movement/Legends|Refugee Relief Movement]] transports had to wait for an orbital minefield to be cleared before examining [[Refugee/Legends|refugee]] settlements on the moon.
